productDisplayName: Q&Q Attractive Women Yellow Dial Watch
description: Case Style: Analog watch with a stainless steel back and rectangular case, is studded with crystals around the dial Dial Style: Shiny yellow dial with an intricate pattern on the dial, has steel coloured hour marks and hands Features: Screw to reset time Strap Style: Yellow coloured strap with a tang clasp and holes to customise fit Water resistant up to 3 BAR Warranty: 1 year
